_comment: Optional daily notes keyed by MM-DD (Gregorian). Add short excerpts you type yourself from Dom Guéranger or other approved sources. Omit a date to use the on-screen placeholder.

01-01.title: Mary, Mother of God (example slot)
01-01.reflection: Replace this block with your own summary for this day. The TV dashboard reads this file from /public/family-dashboard/gueranger.json.
01-01.collect: Optional: your prayer summary for the collect.
01-01.readings: Optional: one-line reminder of readings or a link you keep in family notes.
